name: Plane Tasks Methodology
title: Plane Tasks Methodology
description: Defines the mandatory requirements for interacting with Plane within the Factory, aligning with the active consciousness Memory MCP.
best_practices: Ensure all plane tasks have a strict label.
Include acceptance criteria in the issue description.
anti_patterns: Creating issues without a corresponding type label.
Bypassing the post_solution.py script for task closure.

content.rule: The factory strictly mandates the use of the 'managing-plane-tasks' skill and its associated templates/scripts (create_task.py, post_solution.py) for all interactions with Plane. Tasks must explicitly include module, cycle, epic, schemas, exhaustive factory assets, and strict label governance.

axiomAlignment.A1_verifiability: Patterns are verified through automated testing.
axiomAlignment.A2_user_primacy: The user maintains control over all generated output.
axiomAlignment.A3_transparency: All automated actions are logged and verifiable.
axiomAlignment.A4_non_harm: Strict safety checks prevent destructive operations.
axiomAlignment.A5_consistency: Uniform patterns ensure predictable system behavior.
